rhwpDocumentedDiffs.name: DocInfo/saveTimestamp
rhwpDocumentedDiffs.reason: rhwp stamps the document with the current wall-clock time on every save. Bit-identity is impossible across two sequential saves unless we mock the clock, which v0.1.5 does not attempt.

rhwpDocumentedDiffs.name: DocInfo/generatorString
rhwpDocumentedDiffs.reason: rhwp identifies itself in the HWP file header (e.g. 'rhwp/0.7.13'). The string changes on every release.

rhwpDocumentedDiffs.name: DocInfo/randomDocumentId
rhwpDocumentedDiffs.reason: Some HWP storage streams include per-document UUIDs regenerated on save for caching purposes. Documented in rhwp issue tracker.

rhwpDocumentedDiffs.name: BodyText/sectionMetadata
rhwpDocumentedDiffs.reason: Per-section metadata blocks may include compression hints that rhwp recomputes. The body content itself stays equivalent.

rhwpDocumentedDiffs.name: Storage/compressionFraming
rhwpDocumentedDiffs.reason: The OLE2 container can re-frame compressed streams differently on round-trip without changing the logical content.

policy.v0.1.5: Pass B treats any successful exportHwp → re-open → exportHwpVerify(recovered=true, pageCount unchanged) as a whitelist match. Per-field binary diffing is deferred to v0.2 (see docs/decisions/0002-binary-save-fallback.md step 4).
policy.v0.2: Introduce binary diff that walks the OLE2 storage tree, excludes the streams listed above, and reports the remainder. Targets <5% residual diff per case before claiming bit-level identity.
